jobs.title: Senior React Developer
jobs.description: Looking for a Senior React Engineer to lead the development of our enterprise SaaS dashboards. You will work closely with designers to build premium interfaces.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer (Node/Postgres)
jobs.description: Join our backend systems team to design, build, and maintain high-throughput REST APIs and vector databases. Experience scaling Node.js apps is a must.

jobs.title: AI/Python Developer
jobs.description: Develop next-generation AI agents and large language model matching parsers. You will build clean microservices and configure pipelines using FastAPI and Python.

jobs.title: UX/UI Designer
jobs.description: Seeking a creative UX/UI designer to build design languages, wireframes, and frontends. Must understand user journeys and be capable of writing HTML/CSS prototypes.

jobs.title: DevOps Cloud Engineer
jobs.description: Responsible for maintaining our AWS cloud infrastructure, CI/CD deployment pipelines, containerization clusters, and server monitoring suites.

jobs.title: Junior Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Entry-level role for a developer looking to grow. Assist in building responsive landing pages and modular React widgets in a fast-paced environment.

jobs.title: Technical Product Manager
jobs.description: Bridge the gap between product strategy and engineering execution. Write detailed user stories, lead scrum rituals, and outline release roadmaps.

jobs.title: Talent Acquisition / HR Manager
jobs.description: Manage full-cycle technical recruiting, developer onboarding pipelines, employee engagement, and employee satisfaction initiatives.

jobs.title: Growth Marketing Coordinator
jobs.description: Drive user acquisition and conversion. Run campaigns on search networks, analyze web analytics dashboards, and craft email copywriting drafts.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Analyze complex datasets to deliver business insights. Build analytics dashboards and construct advanced queries for engineering research.

resumes.extracted_text:
Ashish Kumar Gupta
ashishsanotosh523@gmail.com   —   +91-6206534063   —   LinkedIn   —   GitHub   —   LeetCode
Summary
Aspiring Software Engineer with hands-on experience in Java, Selenium WebDriver, TestNG, and Cucumber
(BDD) for automation testing, along with frontend development using React.js. Strong foundation in Data
Structures Algorithms, OOP, and SQL, with 300+ coding problems solved on LeetCode and GeeksforGeeks.
Passionate about building reliable, scalable software and delivering high-quality solutions through continuous
learning and problem-solving.
Technical Skills
•Languages:Java, C++, SQL
•Technologies:Java, Selenium WebDriver, TestNG, Cucumber (BDD), REST Assured, SQL, Apache
POI, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React.js, Tailwind CSS, Git, GitHub,
•Testing:JUnit, Unit Testing, Integration Testing
Experience
CognizantChennai, India
Automation Testing InternJan 2026 – May 2026
•Developed and executed automated test scripts using Java, Selenium WebDriver, TestNG, and Cucumber
(BDD).
•Performed data-driven testing using Apache POI to validate application functionality with multiple test
datasets.
•Gained hands-on experience in SQL database validation and REST Assured API automation testing.
•Learned Jenkins, CI/CD concepts, and Agile methodologies while following automation testing best
practices.
CapsitechJodhpur, India
Frontend Development Intern
•Developed responsive web interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js.
•Built reusable UI components to improve maintainability and user experience.
•Optimized website responsiveness using Tailwind CSS across multiple devices.
•Followed modern frontend development practices in a real-world software environment.
Projects
Weather App– React.js, Vite, OpenWeatherMap API, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSSGitHub
•Built a responsive weather application using React.js and the OpenWeatherMap API to provide real-time
weather information.
•Implemented location-based search and dynamic weather updates with an intuitive, user-friendly inter-
face.
•Optimized application performance using Vite and ensured cross-device compatibility through responsive
design principles.
Education
Haldia Institute of TechnologyHaldia, West Bengal, India
Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology2022 – 2026
CGPA: 7.82 / 10
Certifications & Achievements
•Learn Manual Software Testing + Agile with Jira Tool – Udemy
•Solved400+coding problems on LeetCode and GeeksforGeeks.
•GitHub: Developed frontend and automation testing projects using Java, Selenium, React.js, and JavaScript.

resumes.extracted_text:
Saqlain Zarjis Ansari
Email:  saqlainzarjisansari@gmail.com
LinkedIn:  https://www.linkedin.com/in/saqlain-zarjis-ansari-108b2621b/
GitHub:    https://github.com/Mysterious786
Portfolio:    https://portfolio-my-dun.vercel.app/
Education
•
Haldia Institute Of TechnologyHaldia, West Bengal, India
Bachelor of Technology - Information Technology; GPA: 8.8107-2021 to 06-2025
Relevant Courses: Operating Systems, Data Structures, Analysis of Algorithms, Artificial Intelligence, Machine
Learning,Networking, Databases
Skills Summary
•Languages:  C, C++, Java, JavaScript
•Frameworks:React.js, Node.js, Express.js, Spring Boot
•Databases:MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
•Cloud & Tools:Docker, Kubernetes, Git, Postman, IntelliJ IDEA, VS Code
•Core Concepts:Data Structures & Algorithms, REST APIs, Microservices, Distributed Systems
•AI & Data:Generative AI, Deep Learning,RAG Pipelines, Vector Databases
Experience
•
PwC Acceleration CentersBengaluru, Karnataka, India
Software AssociateAug 2025 – Present
◦Cloud Data Engineering & ERP Modernization:  Engineered enterprise data migration toSAP S/4HANA &
SAP HANA; builtPower BI DQMS dashboards, cutting reporting latency by30%and ensuring real-time
analytics reliability.
◦GenAI Platform Architecture:  Architected aRAG-based code analysis platform (React, Flask, vector DBs,
Azure Blob Storage), adopted by1,000+users; integratedLLM-powered features to automate code reviews.
◦AI Infrastructure & Performance:  Designed intelligent caching and low-latency retrieval layer, reducing repeated AI
compute by40%and enabling scalableGenAI workflowsacross distributed teams.
◦Developer AI Tooling & Full-Stack Integration:  EmbeddedAI feedback directly into IDEs, cutting debugging
time; builtReactfront-ends andFlaskAPIs to deliver real-time suggestions to developers.
◦SAP Backend & Java Systems:  DeliveredABAPservices onS/4HANA, supported Java system upgrades, and
maintained enterprise-criticalSAP–Java interoperabilityacross environments.
•
PwC Acceleration CentersBengaluru, Karnataka, India
Software Programmer InternFeb 2025 – Aug 2025
◦Enterprise Backend & Data Pipelines:  BuiltABAPservices andJava REST APIs; migrated legacy Java
applications to modern stacks, improving system performance and enabling seamlessSAP–microservice data flow.
◦AI Feature Development:  Contributed toGenAI code analyzerfeatures usingFlaskandReact; enhanced
model-backed suggestions that improved developer productivity and code quality.
◦Cloud & UI Engineering:  Developed reusableReactcomponents and integrated RESTful APIs, delivering scalable
UI solutions while supportingcloud-first enterprise modernization.
Projects
•CloudCLI – Multi-DBMS Backup & Automation Tool:  Automated cross-database backups
(MySQL/PostgreSQL/MongoDB), reducing manual effort and improving reliability of scheduled data protection
workflows incontainerizedenvironments.  GitHub    Live
•AI Job Processing Platform – Async GenAI Microservices:  Enabled scalable asynchronousAI job executionusing
queue-based architecture, improving throughput and system reliability under concurrent workloads withfault-tolerant
processing.  GitHub    Live
Honors and Achievements
•2164(Knight) on LeetCode — 365-day streak,Top 1.2%globally (Profile)
•1864(Expert) on Codeforces —Top 2.5%globally (Profile)
•1971rated on CodeChef —Top 3%globally (Profile)
•Global Rank444— TCS CodeVita 2023
•Qualified Round 2 — Meta Hacker Cup (Rank2057)
•ICPC Regionalist— 2023–2024
•Solved3000+DSA & competitive programming problems across platforms
Publications & Patents
•Patent – Machine Learning–Driven Automation for Adaptive Immersive VR Environments (2024):  Filed patent
onML-based system for dynamically adapting VR environments based on user behavior, enhancing interaction quality and
enablingpersonalized immersive experiences.
